notes: Citizen/community mapping projects ecosystem survey. No new routes extracted — all route data captured via OSM and Sakay aspects. This file documents project metadata rather than route data.

projects.data_output: OSM transit relations (assessed in openstreetmap-transit-relations.md aspect)
projects.notes: Primary community source. Kaart Ground Survey 2024/2025 contributing professional edits. SotM 2025 in Manila (Oct 3-5) may catalyze more mapping.

projects.project_name: OSMPH/papercut_fix Issue #75 — Rationalized Jeepney Route Tracker
projects.data_output: Checkbox tracking list of T-series and C/N-series UV Express routes; ~30 checked (mapped), ~325+ unchecked
route_series: T4xx (40+ routes, southern NCR + Cavite + Laguna)
projects.notes: Best tracker for OSM mapping completion status. Opened Oct 17 2020 by TagaSanPedroAko.

projects.data_output: Live app: user-moderated routes; GTFS export: frozen Jun 2020 (349 routes, 2078 stops)
projects.origin: GPS journaling by DOTC-engaged students (2012-2013) riding jeepneys with smartphones
projects.notes: Full assessment in sakay-ph.md. Crowdsourced moderation keeps live app current but no public export available.

projects.data_output: None (no public deployment or route database)
projects.methodology: GPS + accelerometer transit journaling; automated transfer detection; modified RAPTOR routing
projects.notes: IEEE HNICEM 2013. Correct methodology for jeepney GPS data collection but never deployed at scale in Metro Manila.

projects.authors: Narboneta & Teknomo, UP NCTS / UP School of Urban and Regional Planning
projects.data_used: 2013 DOTC/LTFRB GTFS + OSM Metro Manila map
projects.notes: Confirmed OTP+GTFS+OSM pipeline feasibility for Manila. Published at TSSP 2014 + JURP Vol.2.

projects.data_output: None (no public deployment or route database)
projects.institution: School of Information Technology, Mapua University Philippines
projects.conference: ICIIT '24 (9th International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology)
projects.notes: Excludes ride-hailing. 50-participant user study. Route Suggestions feature with cost/time estimates.

projects.data_output: Rail only (LRT-1, LRT-2, MRT-3 arrival crowdsourcing)
projects.developer: Joshua Bumanlag (PLM graduate, iOS developer at ING)
projects.notes: Train tracking only. Zero relevance to jeepney/bus route data.

projects.project_name: SRDP Consulting / JICA Metro Manila Transit Map
projects.notes: 22+ years old. Predates PUVMP, route rationalization. Historical artifact only.

projects.data_output: sakayph/gtfs (frozen Jun 2020) — the foundational Metro Manila GTFS dataset
projects.notes: Created original GTFS update web interface for transport agencies. Interface not publicly maintained. Dataset is the basis for TUMI Datahub and Transitland feeds.
